mnemonics: SALSA: Suggested, Active, Learning, Sourced, Aids - for remembering the types of resources available
keyPoints: Utilize a variety of resource types (text, video, code) for comprehensive understanding
Focus on foundational concepts before moving to advanced implementations
Engage actively with resources by coding along, not just passively consuming
commonMistakes: Assuming one resource type (e.g., only videos) is sufficient for mastery
Skipping practical coding exercises after reviewing theoretical material
Overloading on advanced resources without a solid grasp of the basics first
